sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9660" key="a)ntepei/sodos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπ-είσοδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n9660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">entrance in return,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. παρέχειν</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
